name: create_pull_request
description: Create a pull request in an Azure DevOps Git repository. Specify the source and target branches, title, description, and optional reviewers. The PR enables code review before merging changes into the target branch.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The name of the Azure DevOps organization.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: The name or ID of the project.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The ID or name of the Git repository.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: Version of the API to use. Use '7.1'.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the pull request.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the changes in the pull request. Supports Markdown.

parameters.name: reviewers
parameters.description: Array of reviewer objects, each with an 'id' field (the user's Azure DevOps identity ID).

parameters.name: isDraft
parameters.description: If true, creates a draft pull request that cannot be completed until published.

body.title: Add OAuth2 authentication with Google and GitHub
body.description:
## Changes
- Implemented OAuth2 login flow for Google and GitHub providers
- Added token refresh logic with secure storage
- Added unit tests for auth service

## Testing
- Tested login flow end-to-end in staging
- Verified token refresh after expiry
